pageDesc: Dynamic status updates regarding your spiritual orders and verification logs.
emptyDesc: Your spiritual updates, shipping notices, and payment confirmations will appear here.

messages.order_placed: Your order #{{orderId}} has been successfully placed! Total amount: ₹{{total}}.
messages.payment_verification_pending: Payment screenshot for Order #{{orderId}} has been uploaded successfully. Admin verification is pending.
messages.payment_pending: Please scan the QR code and upload your transaction confirmation screenshot for Order #{{orderId}} to begin verification.
messages.payment_confirmed: Your payment for Order #{{orderId}} has been successfully verified and confirmed by the admin!
messages.payment_declined: Payment proof for Order #{{orderId}} was declined by the admin. (Attempt {{attempt}}/3). Please re-upload a valid transaction screenshot.
messages.order_prepared: Your order #{{orderId}} is being prepared and packed for shipment.
messages.order_shipped: Order #{{orderId}} has been shipped and is now in transit.
messages.order_delivered: Order #{{orderId}} has been delivered. We hope it brings peace and positive energy!

tabDesc: Choose how you wish to receive order reports, daily blessings, and spiritual reminders.
whatsappDesc: Receive real-time tracking links, invoice downloads, and puja blessing photos directly on WhatsApp.
newsletterDesc: Curated monthly suggestions from Vedic experts on upcoming astrological transits, festival pujas, and rituals.
receiptsDesc: Receive digital receipts and secure payment invoice PDFs instantly upon checkout.
mantraDesc: Begin every morning with an encouraging spiritual quote or ritual recommendation based on current lunar phase (Tithi).
